chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP D 660 2025 _______________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on CMA No.3544/2025. 2. For orders on office objections No.1, 2, 3 & 4. 3. For orders on CMA No.3545/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 20.02.2025 Petitioner, Dr. Muhammad Shahabuddin, is present in person. 1. Urgency granted. 2, 3 & 4. Serious office objections have been raised including the following: “1. How this Petition is maintainable regarding dispute of Property of Petitioner, when the remedy of Civil Suit is available under the law? 2. Copies of complete proceedings of CP No. D-4627/2021 to be filed, as mentioned in the Para-6 & 7 Decision at Page No.29 & 31. 3. Address of Petitioner to be given. 4. Original Power of Attorney to be shown.” Prima facie, this petition has been filed to assert the rights in immovable property and in such regard writ is sought to be issued to a private respondent. The same is not amenable to writ jurisdiction, hence, the petition is found to be misconceived. While granting urgency, this petition is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
